decks.notes: The main idea of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent quickly with a combination of efficient creatures and disruptive spells. Cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Quantum Riddler provide early pressure, while cards like Guide of Souls and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah offer additional support and protection for your creatures. The deck also includes a mix of removal spells like Solitude and Galvanic Discharge to deal with threats from the opponent. Overall, the deck aims to be aggressive and proactive, taking advantage of its versatile card pool to control the battlefield and secure victory.

This deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with key creatures like Griselbrand and Atraxa, Grand Unifier, and then using cards like Goryo's Vengeance and Ephemerate to reanimate them for a powerful combo finish. It also includes disruptive elements like Thoughtseize and Force of Negation to protect the combo pieces. The deck aims to efficiently reanimate creatures while controlling the opponent's game plan, ultimately overwhelming them with powerful threats. The inclusion of cards like Psychic Frog and Quantum Riddler adds versatility and card advantage to the strategy.

The main idea of this deck is to use disruptive spells and card draw to protect key combo pieces like Hydroelectric Specimen and Goblin Charbelcher, while also utilizing powerful colorless cards like Lotus Bloom and Sea Gate Restoration. By using a mix of countermagic and removal spells, along with efficient tutors like Whir of Invention and Waterlogged Teachings, the deck aims to assemble a game-winning combo without relying on traditional lands. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student can provide additional card advantage and utility to help the deck achieve its goal.

Utilize the powerful Urza lands to ramp up and control the game, casting big Eldrazi threats like Emrakul and Thought-Knot Seer. Karn, the Great Creator provides utility and disruption, while Ugin, the Spirit Dragon offers strong board control. Chalice of the Void and Trinisphere help disrupt opponents' plays, while Dismember and Warping Wail offer removal options. The deck aims to establish dominance through its mana base and powerful threats, while controlling the game and disrupting opponents' strategies.

The main idea of this deck is to control the game by disrupting the opponent's mana base with land destruction spells like Cleansing Wildfire and Field of Ruin. The deck aims to stabilize the board using removal spells such as Path to Exile and Wrath of God, while also utilizing cards like Solitude and Price of Freedom to maintain control. Additionally, the deck includes cards like Galvanic Discharge and Avengers Disassembled to deal with threats and generate card advantage. The inclusion of Kaheera, the Orphanguard as a companion adds an additional layer of synergy to the deck.

The main concept of this Grixis Control deck is to disrupt and control the opponent's game plan through a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and hand disruption. By using cards like Counterspell, Thoughtseize, and Fatal Push, the deck aims to keep the opponent from establishing their own threats and maintain board control. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Psychic Frog provide card advantage and filtering, while cards like Flame of Anor and Quantum Riddler offer additional removal options. The deck is designed to outlast the opponent and grind out a victory through controlling the game.

The concept of this Lantern Control deck is to disrupt the opponent's game plan by using cards like Thoughtseize, Inquisition of Kozilek, and Pithing Needle to control their hand and board. The deck also utilizes cards like Lantern of Insight, Codex Shredder, and Urza's Saga to manipulate the opponent's draws and prevent them from finding answers. Ensnaring Bridge is used to protect against creature-based strategies, while cards like Narset, Parter of Veils and The Underworld Cookbook provide additional value and card advantage. This deck aims to grind out the opponent and win through attrition.

Utilizing a combination of disruptive hand disruption cards and efficient removal spells, this Mono Black Aggro deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while applying pressure with low-cost aggressive creatures. By utilizing cards like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push to control the board and maintain a strong presence with creatures like Nethergoyf and Emperor of Bones, this deck looks to overwhelm the opponent quickly and efficiently. The inclusion of Eldrazi creatures and the powerful land Urza's Saga provide additional threats and resources to secure victory in the fast-paced Modern format.

The deck focuses on using creatures with various abilities to create a toolbox of options for different situations. By utilizing cards like Yawgmoth, Thran Physician and Agatha's Soul Cauldron, the deck can manipulate the board state and generate value. The inclusion of Green Sun's Zenith allows for flexibility in finding key creatures when needed, while cards like Walking Ballista provide a win condition. The deck also includes ways to recur creatures from the graveyard, such as Grist, the Hunger Tide and Endurance, ensuring a steady stream of threats for the opponent to deal with.

The main concept of this Boros Ponza control deck is to disrupt the opponent's mana base and board state through the use of land destruction spells like Cleansing Wildfire and Field of Ruin. Additionally, the deck utilizes cards like Solitude and Wrath of the Skies for creature removal, while also taking advantage of the Companion Kaheera, the Orphanguard for additional creature support. The deck aims to control the game by limiting the opponent's resources and establishing a dominant board presence with the help of cards like Karn, the Great Creator and Price of Freedom.

The deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana through Eldrazi Temple and Urza's Saga to bring out powerful Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End. It also utilizes synergies with Blade of the Bloodchief and Basking Broodscale to generate powerful tokens and take advantage of +1/+1 counters. With a mix of removal spells like Unholy Heat and Kozilek's Command, as well as disruptive creatures like Glaring Fleshraker, the deck aims to control the board while setting up for explosive combos to win the game.

The main concept of this deck is to combo off with the combination of rituals, card draw, and mana acceleration to generate enough resources to cast a big Grapeshot or use Ral, Monsoon Mage's ability to finish off the opponent. The deck aims to use efficient spells like Pyretic Ritual and Desperate Ritual alongside Ruby Medallion to reduce the cost of spells and generate enough mana to go off in a single turn. The inclusion of Past in Flames allows for spells to be recast from the graveyard, maintaining the combo and overwhelming the opponent.

This deck focuses on generating mana quickly using Eldrazi Temple and Urza's Saga to cast powerful Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End. It also utilizes cards like Basking Broodscale and Glaring Fleshraker to create tokens and control the board. The combo potential comes from cards like Sowing Mycospawn and Malevolent Rumble, which can deal damage to opponents while also synergizing with Blade of the Bloodchief to pump up creatures. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a mix of aggressive creatures and powerful spells.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize the UrzaTron lands (Urza's Power Plant, Urza's Mine, Urza's Tower) to ramp up mana quickly and cast powerful Eldrazi creatures and colorless spells. The deck focuses on controlling the game through cards like Karn, the Great Creator, Thought-Knot Seer, and Ugin, Eye of the Storms, while also disrupting the opponent with cards like Chalice of the Void and Trinisphere. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with big threats and powerful spells while maintaining control of the game.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly reanimate powerful creatures, such as Atraxa, Grand Unifier and Griselbrand, using cards like Goryo's Vengeance and Faithful Mending. Utilizing cards like Ephemerate and Quantum Riddler to protect the combo and disrupt the opponent's strategy, this deck aims to control the board while setting up for game-winning plays. With a mix of removal, disruption, and powerful instant-speed reanimation, this combo instant reanimator deck looks to quickly overwhelm opponents with its powerful creatures and efficient spells.

The deck focuses on generating mana quickly and efficiently with cards like Ruby Medallion and Pyretic Ritual to cast powerful spells like Grapeshot and Ral, Monsoon Mage. The combo aspect comes into play with cards like Wrenn's Resolve, Arid Mesa, and Bloodstained Mire to keep the engine going and dig for key pieces. The goal is to assemble the right combination of cards to overwhelm the opponent with a flurry of spells and burn damage, ultimately leading to victory.
